query:
-- المطاعم اليدوية المفعّلة لكل شارع
SELECT s.id as streetId, s.name as streetName, 
  COUNT(r.id) as manualCount
FROM streets s
LEFT JOIN restaurants r ON r.streetId = s.id AND r.isAcceptingOrders = 1 AND r.isOpen = 1
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY s.id;
